summary: FAQ Hub and References Page testing complete. All features implemented and working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about span in option element - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Homepage does NOT show FAQ section (removed per requirement)
/ukk page loads with 'Usein kysytyt kysymykset' title
/ukk page shows 'Yleiset kysymykset' section (4 general FAQs)
/ukk page shows service-specific FAQ sections (Tasoitustyöt, Maalaustyöt)
/ukk page has FAQPage JSON-LD schema
/ukk page has 'Takaisin etusivulle' back link
/ukk page FAQ expand/collapse works
Service page /tasoitustyot-helsinki shows service-specific FAQ section
Service page has 'UKK - Tasoitustyöt Helsingissä' heading
Service page has FAQPage JSON-LD schema
Service page has 'Katso kaikki kysymykset' link to /ukk
/referenssit page loads with proper title
/referenssit page shows 6 reference cards
/referenssit references have name, description, location, images, contractor
/referenssit has ItemList JSON-LD schema
Admin panel UKK tab shows all 6 FAQs with service tags
Admin FAQ form has 'Palvelu (valinnainen)' service selector dropdown
Admin FAQ list shows 'Yleinen', 'Tasoitustyöt', 'Maalaustyöt' service tags
GET /api/faqs returns all FAQs (6 total)
GET /api/faqs?service_id= returns service-specific FAQs only
GET /api/faqs/grouped returns FAQs grouped by service
Admin FAQ CRUD operations work with service_id field
critical_code_review_comments: FAQ removed from homepage as requested - clean implementation
FaqHubPage.js correctly groups FAQs by service using /api/faqs/grouped endpoint
DynamicServicePage.js fetches service-specific FAQs using service_id
FAQPage JSON-LD schema properly implemented on both /ukk and service pages
ReferencesPage.js displays all reference fields (name, description, location, images) with ItemList schema
Admin FAQ form includes service selector dropdown with all services
seed_data_creation: 2 service-specific FAQs (Tasoitustyöt, Maalaustyöt) and 4 general FAQs present
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features fully implemented and tested: 1) FAQ removed from homepage, 2) /ukk hub page groups FAQs by service with FAQPage schema, 3) Service pages show service-specific FAQs with FAQPage schema, 4) /referenssit page displays references with all required fields, 5) Admin FAQ form has service selector dropdown. Backend endpoints /api/faqs, /api/faqs?service_id=, /api/faqs/grouped all working correctly.

homepage_no_faq.details: FAQ section correctly removed from homepage

ukk_hub_page.details: Groups FAQs by service (Yleiset kysymykset first, then by service), has FAQPage schema

service_page_faqs.details: /tasoitustyot-helsinki shows 1 service-specific FAQ with FAQPage schema

referenssit_page.details: Displays 6 references with name, description, location, images, ItemList schema

admin_faq_service_selector.details: 'Palvelu (valinnainen)' dropdown lists all services, FAQ list shows service tags
